title: Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp And Spreader - dual-function Design| Quick-release Mechanism| Durable & Strong Grip| Abs Handle And Rotation Button| Converts To Spreader In Seconds
features: Dual-Function Design: The Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp and Spreader offers a versatile dual-function design, allowing you to easily switch between clamping and spreading. This flexibility makes it an essential tool for a wide range of tasks, from woodworking and metalworking to DIY projects and home repairs.

Quick-Release Mechanism: Experience efficiency and ease with the quick-release mechanism integrated into the Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp and Spreader. This feature allows you to swiftly adjust the tool's grip or switch between clamping and spreading modes without any hassle.

Durable & Strong Grip: Built for durability, the Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp and Spreader provides a robust and reliable grip with a clamping force of up to 15kg. This ensures that your materials stay securely in place during use, reducing the risk of slippage and improving the quality of your work.

ABS Handle and Rotation Button: The ergonomic ABS handle of the Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp and Spreader is designed for comfort and control, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. Additionally, the rotation button allows for precise adjustments, giving you greater control over the clamping or spreading pressure.

15kg Clamp Force for Secure Hold: With a clamping force of 15kg, the Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp and Spreader ensures a secure hold on various materials, from delicate items to more robust materials. This strong clamping force is essential for achieving accurate and consistent results in your projects, preventing movement that could lead to errors or damage.
description: Introducing the Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp and Spreader, a versatile and essential tool for any DIY enthusiast or professional. This dual-function design seamlessly converts from a clamp to a spreader in seconds, offering flexibility for a wide range of tasks. Whether you're assembling furniture, securing materials, or needing a precise hold, this clamp and spreader set provides the strength and adaptability you need to get the job done right. Crafted with durability in mind, the Dekton clamp features an ABS handle that ensures a comfortable and secure grip, allowing for extended use without hand fatigue. The quick-release mechanism is engineered for efficiency, enabling you to adjust the clamp or spreader effortlessly, saving you valuable time on your projects. With a robust 15kg clamp force, you can trust that your materials will stay firmly in place, providing the stability required for accurate and high-quality work. The rotation button is designed for easy and intuitive use, allowing you to switch between clamping and spreading modes with just a simple twist. This feature, combined with the quick-release mechanism, makes the Dekton 2pc 4" Clamp and Spreader incredibly user-friendly, ensuring that even complex tasks are made simpler. Built to withstand the demands of various applications, this tool is perfect for woodworking, metalworking, and other demanding tasks. Its compact 4" size makes it ideal for working in tight spaces, yet it doesn’t compromise on power or functionality.
